function_v0.doc:
Deposit `amount` of any whitelisted deposit asset and receive share tokens.

Multi-asset v2: if `deposit_assets` list is configured, any asset in that
list is accepted.  Non-base assets are oracle-priced to compute the
base-asset-denominated deposit value used for share minting.

Legacy mode (no `portfolio_assets` configured): only `base_asset` accepted.

Flow (dHedge V2 model):
1. Collect streaming management and performance fees.
2. Snapshot NAV before transfer (oracle pricing).
3. Pull `amount` of `asset` from `from` into vault.
4. `deposit_value` = oracle.price(asset) \xc3\x97 amount  (base-asset terms).
5. `total_shares` = deposit_value \xc3\x97 total_supply / nav_before.
6. Split entry fee as shares minted to manager.
7. Update user's cost_basis for PnL tracking.

# Returns
Number of share tokens minted to `from`.

# Errors
* [`VaultError::Paused`]
* [`VaultError::InvalidAmount`]
* [`VaultError::AssetNotInPortfolio`] \xe2\x80\x94 not in deposit asset list
* [`VaultError::DepositCapExceeded`]
function_v0.name: deposit

function_v0.doc: Return the current NAV (vault base-asset balance + strategy values).
function_v0.name: get_nav

function_v0.doc:
Burn `share_amount` of share tokens and receive a proportional fraction
of every asset in the vault (multi-asset dHedge V2 withdrawal model).

Flow:
1. Collect streaming management and performance fees.
2. Validate share balance and cooldown.
3. **BURN SHARES FIRST** (reentrancy protection).
4. Update user's realized PnL.
5. For each portfolio asset: transfer `fraction \xc3\x97 balance` to `to`.
6. For each active guard: call `withdraw_fraction(vault, num, den, to)`.
Guards send their underlying tokens directly to `to`.

Legacy mode (no portfolio_assets configured): same proportional logic
applied to base_asset only, plus legacy single-asset strategies.

Exit fee fraction stays in the vault \xe2\x80\x94 not transferred to manager.

# Returns
Total value withdrawn in base-asset terms (for events / slippage check).

# Errors
* [`VaultError::Paused`]
* [`VaultError::InvalidAmount`]
* [`VaultError::InsufficientShares`]
* [`VaultError::CooldownActive`]
function_v0.name: withdraw

function_v0.doc:
Execute any authorised operation through a whitelisted guard contract.

This is the single unified dispatch entry-point replacing the old
`invest` / `unwind` / `invest_lp` / `unwind_lp` / `execute_trade`
family of functions.

# Flow
1. `caller` must be the registered manager **or** trader \xe2\x80\x94 both may call.
2. `guard` must appear in `ActiveGuards`.
3. `fn_name` must appear in `AuthorizedOps(guard)`.
4. NAV is snapshotted before dispatch.
5. The vault **injects its own address** as the first argument, then
appends the caller-supplied `args`.  This ensures the guard can only
act on behalf of the vault \xe2\x80\x94 the caller cannot substitute a different
source address.
6. `guard.<fn_name>(vault, args\xe2\x80\xa6)` is called directly by name.
7. NAV is re-measured.  If the drop exceeds `max_loss_bps` the
transaction reverts (TVL guard).

# Arguments
* `caller`  \xe2\x80\x94 Manager or trader address (must `require_auth()`).
* `guard`   \xe2\x80\x94 Active guard contract address.
* `fn_name` \xe2\x80\x94 Guard function name to call (e.g. `"supply"`, `"swap
function_v0.name: execute_op

function_v0.doc:
Perform the one-time anti-inflation seed deposit. Factory only.

The factory calls this after transferring `seed_amount` of base_asset
directly into the vault.  This function mints `seed_amount` shares to
a burn address (all-zeros), ensuring `total_supply > 0` from day one
and eliminating the first-depositor inflation attack.

Can only be called once per vault (enforced via `SeedDeposited` flag).

# Errors
* [`VaultError::SeedAlreadyDeposited`]

function_v0.doc: Set or update the manager's display name. Admin or manager only.

function_v0.doc:
Set the maximum NAV loss allowed per manager operation. Manager only.

After every `invest`, `unwind`, `invest_lp`, `unwind_lp`, and
`execute_trade` the vault checks:
```text
nav_after \xe2\x89\xa5 nav_before \xc3\x97 (1 \xe2\x88\x92 max_loss_bps / 10_000)
```
If the check fails the transaction reverts with
[`VaultError::TvlGuardTripped`], preventing the manager from silently
draining TVL through repeated high-slippage operations.

A typical production value is `100` (1 % per transaction).

Setting `0` is rejected because a zero tolerance disables the NAV-loss
guard entirely, which would allow a manager to execute a damaging
operation without any on-chain slippage protection.  Use the default
of [`DEFAULT_MAX_LOSS_BPS`] (1 000 bps = 10 %) or another non-zero value.

# Errors
* [`VaultError::NotManager`]
* [`VaultError::InvalidAmount`] \xe2\x80\x94 if `bps == 0` or `bps > FEE_DENOMINATOR`
function_v0.name: set_max_loss_bps

function_v0.doc:
Update the annual management fee. Manager only. Capped at [`MAX_MGMT_FEE_BPS`].

The timestamp is NOT reset; accrued-since-last-collection will use the
old rate for the elapsed period and the new rate going forward (standard
fund accounting).

# Errors
* [`VaultError::NotManager`] / [`VaultError::InvalidAmount`]

Synchronize an active guard into or out of the bounded position index.

function_v0.doc:
Permissionlessly settle pending management and performance fees.

Fees are deterministic from vault state: the caller cannot choose the
fee amount, recipient, NAV, or timestamp. This lets keepers, users, UIs,
or the manager sync fee accounting even when no deposit/withdraw occurs.

Returns the number of fee shares minted to the treasury.

Enable or disable transferable vault shares. Admin only.

Shares are non-transferable by default so exit cooldown and per-user PnL
accounting remain accurate. If transfers are enabled, cooldown becomes a
same-address friction control and PnL becomes informational unless a
future transfer-aware accounting design is added.

cases.doc: `initialize` was already called on this contract instance.

cases.doc: An entry-point that requires prior initialization was called before\n`initialize`.
cases.name: NotInitialized

cases.doc: The caller is not the registered manager address.

cases.doc: The vault is currently paused; deposits and withdrawals are blocked.

cases.doc: A zero or negative amount was supplied where a strictly-positive value\nis required (e.g. deposit or withdrawal amount).
cases.name: InvalidAmount

cases.doc: The caller does not hold enough share tokens to satisfy the withdrawal.
cases.name: InsufficientShares

cases.doc: The requested strategy address is not in the vault's whitelist.

cases.doc: The trade guard rejected the proposed trade parameters.
cases.name: TradeGuardRejected

cases.doc: An arithmetic operation overflowed `i128`.
cases.name: Overflow

cases.doc: The share total supply is zero when a non-zero value is required\n(e.g. computing share price before any deposits).
cases.name: ZeroTotalSupply

cases.doc: A strategy asset does not match the vault's configured base asset.
cases.name: AssetMismatch

cases.doc: An operation requires a trade guard but none has been configured for the\nspecified strategy.
cases.name: GuardNotSet

cases.doc: Attempt to remove a strategy that still holds an active (non-zero)\nposition.  Unwind the position before removing the strategy.
cases.name: StrategyHasActivePosition

cases.doc: The deposit would push the vault's total NAV above the configured\ndeposit cap.  Set `deposit_cap` to 0 to disable the cap.
cases.name: DepositCapExceeded

cases.doc: The proposed invest would push a single strategy's NAV share above the\nconfigured `max_concentration_bps` limit.
cases.name: ConcentrationLimitExceeded

cases.doc: A manager operation (invest / unwind / execute_trade) caused the vault's\nNAV to fall below `nav_before \xc3\x97 (1 \xe2\x88\x92 max_loss_bps / 10_000)`.\nIndicates potential exploitation via slippage or an oracle attack.
cases.name: TvlGuardTripped

cases.doc: Oracle token pricing is not supported for LP strategies; LP valuation\nmust be handled inside the strategy contract.
cases.name: LpStrategyOracleUnsupported

cases.doc: An LP strategy has a non-zero position but no internal oracle\nconfigured, so its value cannot be safely used for NAV.
cases.name: LpStrategyOracleRequired

cases.doc: Requested withdrawal cannot be funded from vault cash plus auto-unwound\nsingle-asset strategies.
cases.name: InsufficientLiquidity

cases.doc: Once a strategy is marked LP, the LP flag cannot be cleared.
cases.name: LpStrategyFlagImmutable

cases.doc: The provided `share_token_admin` does not match the share token's\ncurrent admin during vault initialization.
cases.name: ShareTokenAdminMismatch

cases.doc: A withdrawal was attempted before cooldown elapsed since last deposit.

cases.doc: Deposit attempted into a private pool by a non-allowlisted address.

cases.doc: Attempted to commit an announced fee increase before delay elapsed.

cases.doc: Same-ledger operation-type mismatch detected for value-manipulation guard.

cases.doc: The deposit returned fewer shares than `min_shares_out`, or the\nwithdrawal returned fewer base tokens than `min_base_out`.

cases.doc: The asset is not in the factory's global authorized asset list.

Maximum allowed NAV loss per manager operation, in basis points.

After every `invest` / `unwind` / `invest_lp` / `unwind_lp` /

```text
nav_after \xe2\x89\xa5 nav_before \xc3\x97 (1 \xe2\x88\x92 max_loss_bps / 10_000)
```
Reverts with [`VaultError::TvlGuardTripped`] if violated.

tuple_v0.doc: Per-caller operation state for same-ledger manipulation checks.
tuple_v0.name: OpState

void_v0.doc: Ordered list of all assets tracked in NAV (base_asset + USDT + XLM \xe2\x80\xa6).\nEvery asset in this list is priced via the oracle and included in NAV.\nVault managers may only add assets that appear in factory.AuthorizedAssets.
void_v0.name: PortfolioAssets

void_v0.doc: Subset of PortfolioAssets that users may deposit.\nMust always be a subset of PortfolioAssets.
void_v0.name: DepositAssets

void_v0.doc: Ordered list of active strategy guard contract addresses.\nEach guard exposes get_total_value / withdraw_fraction / asset_in_use.\nReplaces the old flat Strategies list for multi-asset vaults.
void_v0.name: ActiveGuards

void_v0.doc: Ordered list of portfolio assets that currently have a non-zero idle\nvault balance. NAV uses this bounded index instead of scanning every\nconfigured portfolio asset on every user operation.
void_v0.name: TrackedAssets

void_v0.doc: Ordered list of active guards that currently have a non-zero strategy\nposition. NAV/withdrawal use this bounded index instead of calling every\nactive guard, including zero-position guards.
void_v0.name: PositionGuards

tuple_v0.doc: Permitted operation types for a given guard contract.\nE.g., a DEX guard may be restricted to [Swap] only, disallowing\nAddLiquidity and RemoveLiquidity for this vault.
tuple_v0.name: AuthorizedOps

void_v0.doc: Factory contract address. Used to validate that portfolio assets are\nin the factory's global AuthorizedAssets whitelist.
void_v0.name: Factory

void_v0.doc: Treasury address \xe2\x80\x94 receives all fee payments (entry, mgmt, perf).
void_v0.name: Treasury

void_v0.doc: Optional human-readable name of the manager for display purposes.
void_v0.name: ManagerName

void_v0.doc: Whether the anti-inflation seed deposit has already been executed.\nSet to true by seed_deposit(); prevents a second call.
void_v0.name: SeedDeposited

tuple_v0.doc: Per-user PnL tracking stored in **persistent** storage so it survives\nindependent of the vault instance TTL.
tuple_v0.name: UserPosition

udt_struct_v0.doc:
Per-user PnL tracking record.

`cost_basis` tracks the base-asset-denominated value paid for currently
held shares (updated on deposit and withdrawal).  `realized_pnl` accumulates
gain or loss each time shares are burned.
udt_struct_v0.name: UserPosition

fields.doc: Total cost in base_asset units for the user's current share holdings.
fields.name: cost_basis

fields.doc: Accumulated realized gain/loss from all past withdrawals.
fields.name: realized_pnl
